title: Automated my MSFT covered call wheel with one prompt speaking to my broker account— 60 sec video of the full build
author: BuildwithPublic
selftext:
Been running the wheel on MSFT manually for a while. Covered calls → if assigned → sell puts to get back in. The usual.

Started using Public's Agentic trading feature and decided to see if I could just describe my strategy in plain english and have it execute autonomously.

The prompt: "Sell covered calls on my MSFT targeting $5K/mo in premium, .25-.30 deltas, monthly expiry. If assigned, keep shares and sell puts to get back in."

It built the full workflow, I reviewed and approved it, and now it runs monthly without me touching it.

Recorded the whole build — took about 60 seconds. Video linked.

Happy to answer questions on the setup or how the execution actually works under the hood. What would you build?

https://reddit.com/link/1sezssi/video/fpdmmm5u5stg1/player
